result.text: Scan: a chromed-out semi, lights like a constellation, name plate reading {pick:'ROAD KING'|'MIDNIGHT RIDER'|'STARDUST'}. This is royalty of the long haul. Request an audience, or admire from formation?

moveon.text: The vessel drifts out of optimal range. Its secrets remain its own. For now.

aud.text: The King acknowledges. One question is permitted, per tradition. Ask about the road ahead, or the road behind?

ahead.text: The King speaks: '{pick:Weather's clear past the ridge|Watch the left lane at the split|Best coffee is two exits up, tell them Stardust sent you}.' Royal intelligence, Captain. Chart accordingly.

behind.text: The King speaks: '{n:2-4} million miles, every one of them earned. The road behind builds the driver ahead.' We ride in the wake of greatness.

adm.text: Formation admiration held. The constellation of marker lights winked once — the royal acknowledgment. That's enough. That's plenty.
